Our Beginning

A warm kitchen full of heart.

What started as weekend baking for friends became something far greater — a community who believe the simplest pleasures are the finest.

Every recipe is a tradition, every batch a labor of devotion.

"Baked by hand, shared with love"

About Us

Passion
in every
crumb.

We craft every batch with love, using only the finest natural ingredients. Premium chocolate, pure cream butter — no artificial shortcuts, just pure gooey happiness from the oven.

Since our ovens first fired up, Little Oven has been serving warm smiles to thousands of cookie lovers. Our recipes are time-honored traditions passed down through generations.

customers say
